title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ
scenario: Custom EQ settings are not updated correctly when re-saving after modifying values in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on a custom EQ slot (e.g., Custom 1)
Adjust some frequency band sliders to new positions
Exit the Equalizer screen and return to Audio Settings
Re-enter Audio Settings → Equalizer and select the same custom EQ slot
expected: The custom EQ loads with the newly saved slider positions (the values adjusted in step 5).
